reviews.review_description: You've officially joined the fan club for your game. More members are welcome, and reviews are the initiation! Sign up today! 😉" if u like a little lost and found game and wanna find cute lil friends that r lost and need u to help them, play this game!!! Hurry there so cute I can’t stand it!! And don’t even get me started about the developer and all the time and care he puts into developing his games and responding to his reviewees!! #prettycooldude😎😜

I will recommend buying this game because it has cool and unique levels, and it also has a cool helicopter and this game reminds me of a mobile game (in a good way). The only thing I didn’t like about the game is that it has no multiplayer or level editor. 


Overall great game 
10/10

developer_response.body: level editor hmm I like that idea :) Super happy you liked the game was fun making
